name: io.github.zacccck/m365-attachment-reader-mcp-local
description: Local stdio MCP server for Claude Desktop that reads and parses Outlook email attachments via Microsoft Graph.

environment_variables.name: M365_CLIENT_ID
environment_variables.description: Microsoft Entra application (client) ID used for device-code login.

environment_variables.name: M365_TENANT_ID
environment_variables.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID. Use common for multi-tenant or personal Microsoft accounts.

environment_variables.name: M365_AUTO_OPEN_BROWSER
environment_variables.description: Whether begin_auth should attempt to open the Microsoft login page automatically.
